title: Patch
description: NEW in v2. A structured record of one code change proposed for a unit by a converter or repairer: the files touched, the diff evidence, and the intent it serves. v1 tracked code changes only implicitly (targetPaths on the unit + evidence hashes in the ledger); v2 makes the change a first-class, reviewable/auditable artifact. Framework-neutral — the produced code's target-framework specifics are captured in targetAdapter, not in the patch structure.

targetsCounterexample.description: Required for repair patches: the ceId this patch claims to fix (anti-loop tracking depends on it).

changes.description: Per-file changes. All paths must be within the target write-scope (target/**).

diffRef.description: Content-addressed pointer to the unified-diff artifact for this file.

afterSha256.description: Hash of the file after applying the change.

generatedArtifacts.description: Companion artifacts the patch also produced.

targetAdapter.description: Target-framework-specific facts about the produced code (e.g. Angular2+ standalone component vs NgModule declaration, signal usage). Optional.
